message:
feat(storage): Add timestamp filters and OR-logic labels to ListFilters

Enhance the beads query capabilities with new filtering options for more
flexible issue retrieval and conformance testing:

ListFilters Enhancements (src/storage/sqlite.rs):
- Add `updated_before: Option<DateTime<Utc>>` filter for issues updated
  before a specific timestamp (uses RFC3339 format for SQLite comparison)
- Add `updated_after: Option<DateTime<Utc>>` filter for issues updated
  after a specific timestamp
- Add `labels_or: Option<Vec<String>>` filter for OR-based label matching
  (any of the specified labels must match, complementing the existing
  AND-based `labels` filter)

CLI Command Updates:
- list.rs, q.rs, search.rs: Initialize new filter fields to None in
  build_filters() to maintain backward compatibility

Conformance Test Suite:
- Add comprehensive tombstone conformance test verifying delete behavior
  creates proper tombstones with metadata preservation
- Add batch operation conformance tests for multi-issue scenarios
- Add edge case coverage for empty filters, null handling, and boundary
  conditions
- Refactor test structure for better isolation and clearer assertions
- Remove redundant external dependency test cases

New Test Files:
- tests/benchmark_comparison.rs: Performance comparison benchmarks
- tests/e2e_defer.rs: End-to-end tests for defer/undefer functionality

The timestamp filters enable time-based queries essential for sync
operations and incremental updates. The labels_or filter supports
use cases where issues should match any of several categories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

         deleted_by TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',

-        compaction_level INTEGER,
+        compaction_level INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
         compacted_at TEXT,
         compacted_at_commit TEXT,
-        original_size INTEGER,
+        original_size INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
         sender TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
         ephemeral INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
         pinned INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
